packet.title: PROMETHEUS Workforce Spine Adaptive Edge Packet
packet.mission: Convert the deadline warboard into a dual-surface, proof-driven workforce spine that executes known tasks and safely absorbs unexpected work.

meta_fate.title: PROMETHEUS Workforce Spine Adaptive Edge Packet
meta_fate.definition: A dual-surface ChatGPT Work and Codex execution packet that converts the PROMETHEUS deadline warboard into adaptive proof packets, sparse role activation, unknown-task synthesis, evidence receipts, recovery paths, and release closure.

operating_contract.prime_directive: Do not stop at analysis. Execute every currently possible proof packet, preserve truth, and continue independent work around blockers.
operating_contract.done_definition: Acceptance criteria pass, evidence exists, receipt is emitted, state is updated, and the claim unlocked is no broader than the proof.
rules: One active P0 dependency chain at a time; parallelize independent P1 work only when state and evidence remain isolated.
No invented evidence, synthetic external confirmations, or 'basically done' states.
Snapshot before mutation and use the least permission required.
Continue all independent work when one task is blocked.
After two failed attempts with the same strategy, change tool, role, or route.
Unexpected work becomes an X-task with acceptance criteria, owner, approval class, and proof requirement.
Every consequential action emits a ledger event and every completed task emits a receipt.
Public outputs require Medusa disclosure review before release.

surface_router.WORK: Research, analysis, connected-app workflows, documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, sites, current information, and ambiguous knowledge work.
surface_router.CODEX: Repository, code, terminal, local files, build, tests, package, CI, Git, runtime, and automation.
surface_router.HYBRID: Work performs research/planning/artifact design while Codex implements or validates technical changes; the handoff is a hashed artifact.
surface_router.HUMAN: Credentials, irreversible external actions, public submission, destructive changes, subjective signoff, and physical recording.

approval_classes.meaning: External side effects, remote pushes, messages, connector writes
approval_classes.rule: Proceed only when task explicitly authorizes the action; record receipt

approval_classes.meaning: Credentials, publishing, contest submission, deletion, payments, legal acceptance, destructive operations
approval_classes.rule: Require explicit human approval immediately before action

proof_classes.minimum_evidence: Created or modified file with path and checksum
Tests, render inspection, schema validation, or reverse check
Machine-readable receipt linking inputs, outputs, hashes, and verdict
Remote URL/state, submission ID, message ID, CI result, or human signoff

unknown_task_protocol.name: Capture
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Normalize the requested outcome, constraints, inputs, deadline, and prohibited actions.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Census
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Inventory available files, tools, connectors, repositories, apps, credentials, and execution surfaces.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Classify
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Score known archetypes. If no route reaches 0.75 confidence, mark UNKNOWN_EDGE_CASE.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Bound
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Set approval class, blast radius, rollback plan, and smallest reversible experiment.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Synthesize
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Create temporary X-role and X-task with owner, dependencies, proof, and stop condition.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Experiment
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Execute the smallest useful slice in a sandbox or copied workspace.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Verify
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Run direct and reverse checks; reject unsupported success.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Promote
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Promote, repair, reroute, or rollback based on evidence.

unknown_task_protocol.name: Register
unknown_task_protocol.instruction: Add the successful route to the archetype/role registry and emit a capability genome candidate.

task_archetypes.signals: repository, code, bug, feature, refactor, dependency, test, build
git history, branch divergence, lost commit, reflog, merge, release
task_archetypes.proof: refs + commit SHAs + remote reachability + regression

task_archetypes.signals: research, compare, investigate, current rules, market, sources
xlsx, csv, model, tracker, formulas, dashboard, variance
task_archetypes.proof: editable workbook + formula scan + visual QA

task_archetypes.signals: doc, report, brief, quickstart, policy, proposal, case study
task_archetypes.proof: finished artifact + source map + render QA

task_archetypes.signals: slides, deck, pitch, judge story, architecture diagram
task_archetypes.proof: editable deck + visual QA + timing map

task_archetypes.signals: dataset, metrics, logs, anomalies, statistics, reconcile
local files, Windows, PowerShell, desktop app, install, screenshot
task_archetypes.proof: command log + artifact paths + screenshots where needed

task_archetypes.signals: WSL, Ubuntu, bash, Linux, cross-runtime, failover
Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Slack, Teams, CRM, GitHub, Discord
task_archetypes.proof: action receipt + external confirmation + redacted ledger

task_archetypes.signals: latest, current, today, rules, deadline, price, status, news
secret, token, private path, vulnerability, scrub, disclosure
task_archetypes.roles: Medusa Security Auditor; Red Team Challenger
task_archetypes.proof: scan results + redaction diff + release verdict

task_archetypes.signals: contest, legal, eligibility, license, portal, submit
task_archetypes.proof: source/date checklist + confirmation ID + archived assets

task_archetypes.signals: video, screenshot, recording, demo, voiceover, image
remind, schedule, recurring, watch, monitor, alert
task_archetypes.proof: task schedule + trigger condition + run receipt

task_archetypes.signals: failure, outage, corruption, regression, broken environment
buy, product, vendor, quote, recommendation, cost
unrecognized, cross-domain, conflicting, missing tool, novel output
task_archetypes.roles: Novel Task Synthesizer; Janus Prime Dispatcher
task_archetypes.proof: capability census + reversible experiment + registered archetype

role_registry.responsibility: Owns mission state, dependency order, surface routing, and stop/continue decisions.
Creates a temporary task archetype and role bundle when no known route fits.
Finds, verifies, and synthesizes current or source-backed information.
Separates facts, assumptions, contradictions, and proof sufficiency.
Implements repository changes and maintains bounded scope.
Recovers lineages, compares refs, and protects authoritative history.
Creates reproducible builds, packages, installs, and clean environments.
Designs and runs unit, integration, smoke, and adversarial tests.
Converges artifacts, versions, hashes, tags, and release immutability.
Runs PowerShell and Windows-local workflows.
Runs Linux/WSL workflows and cross-runtime checks.
Designs checkpoint, failover, replay, and resume behavior.
Creates and audits workbooks, formulas, trackers, and dashboards.
Cleans, reconciles, analyzes, and explains structured data.
Builds repeatable transformations, schemas, and data pipelines.
Creates polished documents, briefs, quickstarts, and reports.
Checks accuracy, coherence, commands, and reproducibility.
Builds editable, judge-ready decks and visual narratives.
Maps evidence into a concise product and competition story.
Uses connected apps and records external side effects.
Publishes sanitized structured events to Discord and reconciles IDs.
Finds secrets, unsafe disclosures, private paths, and overclaims.
Attempts to falsify claims and force evidence-backed repair.
Allows promotion only when all acceptance evidence exists.
Maintains ledger, receipts, hashes, lineage, and blocker records.
Captures screenshots, video, demo outputs, and evidence references.
Freezes and rehearses the golden path under time constraints.
Verifies current rules, licensing, eligibility, and required fields.
Performs dry run, submit, confirmation capture, and post-check.
Creates stakeholder-ready messages and updates.
Creates one-time and recurring task schedules.
Monitors changing conditions and reports only meaningful changes.
Coordinates containment, recovery, decision log, and next state.
Tries alternate routes, rollback, restore, and artifact salvage.
Tracks time, credits, token cost, and deadline pressure.
Approves credentials, publishing, submissions, deletion, and irreversible actions.

edge_case_trials.condition: Novel task with no matching archetype
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Invoke Unknown Task Protocol; synthesize temporary role; add X-task

edge_case_trials.condition: Input file is corrupted or partially readable
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Preserve original; inspect alternate representations; extract recoverable content; record loss

edge_case_trials.condition: User changes goal mid-execution
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Checkpoint current state; diff old/new objective; re-plan only affected packets

edge_case_trials.condition: Required tool is unavailable
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Run capability census; choose fallback surface/tool; block only irreducible remainder
edge_case_trials.proof: Capability matrix + fallback result or exact blocker

edge_case_trials.condition: Task crosses Work and Codex
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Create explicit handoff artifact with input/output contract and hashes

edge_case_trials.condition: Credential is missing
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Continue independent work; generate credential-ready stub; record approval gate
edge_case_trials.proof: Blocked External state + exact unblock instruction

edge_case_trials.condition: Task implies irreversible external action
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Prepare preview/dry run; stop at A3 approval boundary

edge_case_trials.condition: Conflicting source files disagree
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Create contradiction register; rank source authority; request or infer with label

edge_case_trials.condition: Fresh web fact is required
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Research current authoritative sources and date-stamp evidence

edge_case_trials.condition: Unexpected binary or unknown file type
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Identify format; materialize safely; use native parser or visual inspection

edge_case_trials.condition: Spreadsheet has hidden formula errors
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Scan formulas, inspect precedents, recompute, and render key ranges

edge_case_trials.condition: Repository has dirty or divergent history
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Snapshot, create recovery branch/tag, compare, reconcile non-destructively

edge_case_trials.condition: Long task exceeds one context window
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Checkpoint every proof packet; maintain state.json and ledger.jsonl
edge_case_trials.proof: Resume test + no duplicated side effect

edge_case_trials.condition: Parallel agents produce conflicting outputs
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Use deterministic merge criteria and SECA adjudication
edge_case_trials.proof: Comparison report + selected output + rejected evidence

edge_case_trials.condition: A test passes but proof is weak
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Run reverse verification and tamper/replay challenge

edge_case_trials.condition: A task looks complete but acceptance is ambiguous
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Rewrite acceptance as observable pass/fail criteria before promotion

edge_case_trials.condition: Sensitive data appears in logs or media
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Quarantine, redact, rotate if needed, rerun Medusa scan

edge_case_trials.condition: Submission portal or external service fails
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Capture timestamped failure; retry bounded times; preserve alternate submission package
edge_case_trials.proof: Failure evidence + retry log + contingency packet

edge_case_trials.condition: Generated artifact has visual defects
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Render, inspect every page/sheet/slide, repair, rerender

edge_case_trials.condition: Task needs a new reusable capability
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Extract motif, define inclusion/exclusion rules, register genome, prove on second target

edge_case_trials.condition: User asks for a task not possible in current surface
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Produce exact handoff and launch instructions rather than pretending execution

edge_case_trials.condition: External result changes after completion
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Create monitor/scheduled task and update only on meaningful change

edge_case_trials.condition: Prompt contains multiple unrelated outputs
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: Split into dependency-aware packets, preserve one mission ledger

edge_case_trials.condition: Agent becomes stuck repeating one strategy
edge_case_trials.expected_behavior: After two failed attempts, change tool/role/route; escalate with evidence

tasks.Task: Confirm the canonical local checkout, current branch, working tree, and repo root
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Recorded repo path, branch, status, remotes, and HEAD in evidence/reconnaissance/
tasks.Blocker: Wrong checkout or uncommitted destructive changes

tasks.Task: Locate c691bf4 and 6d12685 in branches, tags, reflog, and unreachable Git objects
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Git object search log and explicit recovery verdict for both SHAs
tasks.Blocker: Objects absent and no equivalent lineage found

tasks.Task: Protect the strongest reachable implementation with an archival branch and tag
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Archive branch/tag resolves to protected implementation commit

tasks.Task: Configure canonical GitHub remote and fetch main without altering local work
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: origin URL recorded; fetch succeeds; remote refs visible

tasks.Task: Push the protected implementation to a recovery branch
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Recovery branch visible on GitHub and commit reachable

tasks.Task: Compare remote canon against recovered implementation and reconcile non-destructively
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Complete diff reviewed; canon and implementation coexist under one history

tasks.Task: Run regression suite after reconciliation
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: All existing tests, doctor, demo, receipt verification, and compile checks pass

tasks.Task: Publish authoritative branch/PR and update README status from scaffold to evidence-backed state
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Remote branch, PR/merge, current commit, and README status all agree
tasks.Claim Unlocked: Remote repository matches actual build truth

tasks.Task: Create a fresh clean checkout of the reconciled authoritative commit
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Fresh directory resolves to exact authoritative SHA

tasks.Task: Install or vendor the Python build tooling needed for package creation
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: python -m build is available in the clean environment

tasks.Task: Run complete test suite and compile checks in the clean checkout
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Zero test failures; compileall succeeds; logs archived

tasks.Task: Run prometheus doctor, deterministic demo, and receipt verification
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Doctor healthy; demo completes; receipt hash verifies

tasks.Task: Build wheel and source distribution with python -m build
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Wheel and sdist exist with SHA-256 hashes

tasks.Task: Install the wheel into a clean virtual environment and run smoke checks
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Installed CLI runs init, doctor, demo, receipt verify without source edits

tasks.Task: Verify rollback, clean, and uninstall behavior
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: State cleanup and uninstall leave no false success or broken residue

tasks.Task: Push reconciled commit and observe GitHub CI through completion
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Remote CI passes lint/tests/package/install/schema/receipt checks

tasks.Task: Configure OpenAI credentials without committing secrets
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Credential is available through environment and redaction test passes

tasks.Task: Run one material GPT-5.6 route-generation and differentiation call
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Prompt, response summary, model name, timestamp, cost metadata, and artifact hash recorded

tasks.Task: Run one material GPT-5.6 adversarial or test-proposal call and update contribution log
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Model contribution changes an actual challenge/test and is linked to evidence

tasks.Task: Configure the ServerForge Discord webhook securely
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Webhook stored outside repo; sanitizer and secret redaction verified

tasks.Task: Publish sanitized signature events to ServerForge
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Discord receives mission, candidate, challenge, block, repair, receipt, and release events

tasks.Task: Correlate Discord messages with the local JSONL evidence ledger
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Event IDs and hashes match between local ledger and sanitized delivery

tasks.Task: Run clean Windows install, doctor, demo, and receipt verification
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Windows commands and screenshots/logs archived

tasks.Task: Run clean WSL or Ubuntu install, doctor, demo, and receipt verification
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: WSL/Ubuntu commands and logs archived

tasks.Task: Demonstrate Windows-to-WSL/Ubuntu checkpoint failover with replay protection
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Intentional Windows failure, durable checkpoint, resumed WSL command, lineage preservation, duplicate block, matching output hash
tasks.Claim Unlocked: Survives runtime failure without mission loss

tasks.Task: Select a bounded source-mutating improvement mission against PROMETHEUS itself
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Mission is small, safe, valuable, testable, and has rollback criteria

tasks.Task: Generate three materially different self-build routes and isolated worktrees
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Novelty gate and three isolated candidates are recorded
tasks.Blocker: Routes are cosmetic or worktrees fail
tasks.Claim Unlocked: PROMETHEUS can evolve its own code

tasks.Task: Execute candidates and produce at least one genuine evidence-backed rejection
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Candidate failure arises from real test/security evidence, not a scripted label
tasks.Blocker: All routes identical or fake failure

tasks.Task: Challenge the provisional winner and force a SECA promotion block
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Independent challenge reproduces a defect and promotion state becomes blocked

tasks.Task: Repair the blocked self-build candidate, retest, and promote
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Diff, full retest, promotion decision, rollback state, and final commit archived

tasks.Task: Generate the recursive self-build receipt and lineage record
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Receipt references mission, candidates, failure, block, repair, tests, commit, hashes, and genome

tasks.Task: Select a safe second repository or competition arena for positive genome reuse
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Target meets declared reuse conditions and contains no sensitive data
tasks.Claim Unlocked: Reuse demonstration has a valid substrate

tasks.Task: Match and reuse the genome on the second repository, then re-prove the result
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Match report, applied motif, fresh tests, receipt hash, and outcome evidence exist
tasks.Blocker: Reuse conditions mismatch or test failure

tasks.Task: Attempt out-of-bounds reuse and prove exclusion denial
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Exclusion rule blocks invalid reuse with evidence

tasks.Task: Verify console state against the final receipt and event ledger
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Mission, candidates, tests, runtime, block, repair, receipt, genome, and ServerForge state match backend evidence
tasks.Blocker: UI contradicts receipt or shows fabricated state

tasks.Task: Tamper with a copied artifact and prove receipt verification fails
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Tampered artifact fails hash/receipt verification

tasks.Task: Replay a consequential operation and prove duplicate execution is blocked
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Replay guard records duplicate denial

tasks.Task: Remove a mandatory criterion and prove SECA blocks promotion
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Promotion fails with missing-evidence explanation

tasks.Task: Inject an unsupported challenger claim and prove SECA rejects it
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Unsupported finding is rejected and logged

tasks.Task: Update build ledger, task status, acceptance matrix, and known limitations
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Every P0/P1 gate has status, evidence path, blocker, and claim state

tasks.Task: Run Medusa public/private disclosure and secret scrub
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: No secrets/private paths; public claims match evidence; IP-sensitive internals classified
tasks.Claim Unlocked: Public package is safe to show

tasks.Task: Generate final JSON/Markdown receipts, manifests, genomes, proof bundle, and release archive
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: All artifacts exist, verify, and carry final commit/timestamps/disclosure class

tasks.Task: Update README, CHANGELOG, RELEASE_CHECKLIST, competition submission doc, and contribution logs
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Docs reproduce real commands and cite exact evidence artifacts

tasks.Task: Create final release commit/tag and record exact SHA-256 values
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Release commit/tag, wheel, sdist, proof bundle, and hashes are remotely visible
tasks.Claim Unlocked: Release candidate is immutable and reproducible

tasks.Task: Run final independent Codex audit and fix material findings
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Audit report, findings, fixes, retest, and final verdict archived

tasks.Task: Freeze the three-minute demo script against the actual golden path
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Script timestamps total <= 3:00 and each scene maps to live evidence

tasks.Task: Run three timed rehearsals and record timing/failure notes
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Three runs complete; median <= 3:00; failsafe path tested

tasks.Task: Capture final screenshots of console, candidates, failover, receipt, genome, and ServerForge
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Public-safe screenshots are legible and tied to evidence IDs

tasks.Task: Record and export the final demo video
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Video plays, meets time/format limits, and shows required proof loop

tasks.Task: Write a one-page judge quickstart and reproduction sequence
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Fresh reviewer can install/run/verify with exact commands

tasks.Task: Regenerate the ServerForge case study from structured events
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Case study chronology matches event IDs, commits, receipts, and limitations

tasks.Task: Finalize architecture diagram and product story for submission
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Diagram and story show Codex → EDEN → PROMETHEUS self-build → proof without false claims

tasks.Task: Verify current contest rules, deadline, eligibility, licensing, visibility, and required fields
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Current rules captured with source/date; checklist updated

tasks.Task: Complete a submission-form dry run with all assets and text
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: All fields populated; links work; upload sizes/formats accepted

tasks.Task: Submit the final competition entry
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Confirmation screen/email and submission ID archived

tasks.Task: Complete the required feedback action if applicable
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Feedback confirmation archived or marked not required by verified rules

tasks.Task: Perform post-submission verification and archive the immutable final packet
tasks.Acceptance / Proof: Submitted links, commit, release, video, hashes, and confirmation all reopen successfully
tasks.Claim Unlocked: Submission is safely sealed before 5:00 p.m.

risks.Risk: Local implementation commit cannot be recovered
risks.Mitigation / Decision Rule: Protect strongest reachable lineage and push recovery branch before any new work

risks.Risk: Remote canon and implementation histories diverge
risks.Mitigation / Decision Rule: Reconcile through recovery branch and PR; never force-push
Time-box physical failover to 75 minutes; preserve honest limitation if infrastructure fails
Use a tiny bounded mission with explicit rollback and one-file or one-module scope

risks.Risk: Positive genome reuse target is too complex
risks.Mitigation / Decision Rule: Use a small arena repository with known tests and clear reuse conditions

risks.Risk: Live credentials or Discord configuration unavailable
risks.Mitigation / Decision Rule: Execute all independent tasks; document exact blocker; do not invent evidence
Freeze golden path, rehearse three times, remove explanatory detours

risks.Risk: Public package leaks private paths, secrets, or unpublished IP
risks.Mitigation / Decision Rule: Run Medusa disclosure scrub before screenshots/video/export

risks.Risk: Submission rules differ from assumed checklist
risks.Mitigation / Decision Rule: Verify current rules before final asset formats and upload
Use 50/10 work cycles, one active sprint, and a seven-hour sleep block

source_notes: ChatGPT Work can gather context across apps/files, break complex projects into steps, and create finished materials.
Work is oriented toward research and finished documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and sites.
Codex is the dedicated software/repository/terminal agent.
codex exec supports scripted runs, JSONL output, explicit sandbox settings, and structured output schemas.
Use least permissions; workspace-write is the current non-interactive edit mode.
